reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  缺少break语句，导致输出后循环继续，引发无限循环超时
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  missing break after printing; program enters infinite loop, causing Time Limit Exceeded
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop does not break after printing the result when '=' is encountered, causing an infinite loop and Time Limit Exceeded. A 'break;' statement is needed here.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The loop continues indefinitely after printing because there is no break statement. When d=='=', the program prints the result but stays in the while(1) loop, attempting to scan more input or hanging, causing Time Limit Exceeded. A 'break;' is needed here.]
